zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Windsor III於大約1158年出生在英國米德萊可斯坦維爾時，他的父親William de Windsor II Feudal Baron of Eton, Buckinghamshire28歲，母親Baroness  Christina de Wilham24歲。他於大約1188年與Edyth Moses在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1230年在英國英格蘭米德萊可斯坦維爾享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Windsor III于大约1158年出生在英国米德萊可斯坦維爾时，他的父亲William de Windsor II Feudal Baron of Eton, Buckinghamshire28岁，母亲Baroness  Christina de Wilham24岁。他于大约1188年与Edyth Moses在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1230年在英国英格兰米德萊可斯坦維爾享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Windsor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Windsor (Berkshire), Windsor in Stratford upon Avon (Warwickshire), Winsor in Copythorne (Hampshire), Winsor in Yealmpton (Devon), or Broadwindsor and Little Windsor (Dorset). All these places have the same linguistic origin, whose meaning is controversial, but seems to be ‘windlass bank’ (Old English windels + ōra).

in Yorkshire perhaps a habitational name from Winds Over in Middleton (near Ilkley, Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English wind ‘wind’ (genitive windes) + ofer ‘slope, hill, ridge’.

variants.name: Winzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Ilse, Ingo, Wilhelm.
German: occupational name for a vine-grower or vintner, Middle High German winzer.
German: habitational name from any of various places so named in Bavaria.

variants.name: Winsor
meanings: English: variant of   Windsor  . This is the spelling used for places so named in Devon and Hampshire.
Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Winzer  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Windsor III was born about 1158, in Stanwell, Middlesex, England, his father, William de Windsor II Feudal Baron of Eton, Buckinghamshire, was 28 and his mother, Baroness  Christina de Wilham, was 24. He married Edyth Moses about 1188, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1230, in Stanwell, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Windsor III est né environ 1158, à Stanwell, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, William de Windsor II Feudal Baron of Eton, Buckinghamshire, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Baroness  Christina de Wilham, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Edyth Moses environ 1188, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1230, à Stanwell, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Windsor III um 1158 in Stanwell, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Windsor II Feudal Baron of Eton, Buckinghamshire 28 und seine Mutter Baroness  Christina de Wilham 24. Er hat um 1188 in England Edyth Moses geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1230 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Stanwell, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Edyth Moses circa 1188, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1230, nel Stanwell, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Windsor IIIが約1158年にイギリスミッドレセックススタンウエルで生まれた時，父William de Windsor II Feudal Baron of Eton, Buckinghamshireは28歳，母Baroness  Christina de Wilhamは24歳であった。約1188年にイギリスでEdyth Mosesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1230年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックススタンウエルで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Windsor III(이)가 대략 1158년 영국 미들레세스 스탠웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Windsor II Feudal Baron of Eton, Buckinghamshire(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness  Christina de Wilham(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1188년 영국에서 Edyth Moses(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스탠웰에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Windsor III родился около 1158 г. в местности станвелл, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Windsor II Feudal Baron of Eton, Buckinghamshire было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness  Christina de Wilham, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Edyth Moses около 1188 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1230 г. в местности станвелл, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.
